releaseNotes: v0.25.0 — audit cleanup pass. Eight P1/P2 fixes from the Sonnet+Codex independent reviews after the rocky v0.24.13–v0.24.22 string. Highlights: dashboard 'Undo' SnackBar now syncs to peers via a proper RevertOp (silent cross-device divergence was previously happening on every Undo); Sync Diagnostics pendingCount scopes to current pharmacy + surfaces cross-pharmacy stale rows separately; audit-log CSV export uses cursor pagination so concurrent writes can't skip or duplicate rows; source_device_id added to the export; peer audit-log narrative aligned with originator for expire_auto/delete/quarantine/cycle_count_deplete; lastError clears after partial-success drains. 400 tests passing.
